howTo.name: How to use the Lorem Ipsum Generator
howTo.description: Generate Lorem Ipsum dummy text in seconds. Choose mode, style and format, then copy or download the result.

steps.name: Choose a generation mode
steps.text: Select one of 9 modes: paragraphs, sentences, words, lists, headings, links, table, blockquotes or definitions. Set the count.

steps.name: Choose a text style
steps.text: Pick one of 8 styles: Lorem Ipsum, Hipster, Business, English filler, Bacon, Cupcake, Pirate or Legal Ipsum.

steps.name: Set the output format
steps.text: Choose plain text or HTML with tags. Adjust paragraph length as needed.

steps.name: Copy or download the result
steps.text: Click Generate, then copy text to clipboard, copy HTML code or download a .txt file.

contentBlocks.title: What is Lorem Ipsum and what is it used for
contentBlocks.html:
Lorem Ipsum is the standard placeholder text used in the printing, graphic design and web development industries for over 500 years. The text originates from De Finibus Bonorum et Malorum (On the Ends of Good and Evil) written by Marcus Tullius Cicero in 45 BC. The original passage was deliberately altered — words were added, removed and rearranged — so the text has no meaning but retains a natural rhythm and letter distribution similar to real language.

The Lorem Ipsum Generator lets you quickly create any amount of dummy text for mockups, UI prototypes, graphic designs and typographic layout testing. The tool offers 9 generation modes (paragraphs, sentences, words, lists, headings, links, tables, blockquotes, definitions), 8 text styles and real-time statistics.

contentBlocks.title: The history of Lorem Ipsum — from Cicero to modern design
contentBlocks.html:
Lorem Ipsum has over 2,000 years of history. The original passage comes from section 1.10.32 of De Finibus Bonorum et Malorum by Cicero, written in 45 BC. The work is a philosophical treatise on ethics — Cicero analysed hedonism and stoicism, arguing for a balanced approach to pleasure and pain.

The use of this text as filler in printing dates to the 1500s, when an unknown printer used Cicero's passage to create a type specimen book. The text survived five centuries, passing through the eras of hand typesetting, Linotype and phototypesetting.

The modern popularity of Lorem Ipsum began in the 1960s when Letraset placed the text on transfer-lettering sheets used in graphic studios. The definitive breakthrough came in 1985 when Aldus Corporation included Lorem Ipsum as the default placeholder text in PageMaker — one of the first DTP (Desktop Publishing) programs. From that moment on, Lorem Ipsum became the industry standard.

Richard McClintock, a Latin professor at Hampden-Sydney College in Virginia, identified the source of the text in the 1980s, discovering that the words lorem ipsum are a corrupted fragment of Latin from Cicero's work. His research confirmed that Lorem Ipsum is not a random collection of words but has genuine literary roots.

contentBlocks.title: 9 content generation modes
contentBlocks.description: The generator offers 9 different content types — from classic paragraphs to tables and definitions:

items.title: Paragraphs
items.description: Classic text blocks with controlled length (short, medium, long). Ideal for website mockups, CMS templates and UI prototypes.

items.title: Sentences
items.description: Individual sentences of random length (5–15 words). Useful for testing form fields, product descriptions and short text blocks.

items.title: Words
items.description: Random individual words from the selected bank. Ideal for tags, labels, category names and testing text length in UI components.

items.title: Lists
items.description: Numbered lists (text) or <ul><li> (HTML). For navigation menus, feature lists, product specs and FAQ items.

items.title: Headings
items.description: Random H1–H6 headings in Markdown or HTML format. For testing typographic hierarchy and content structure.

items.title: Links
items.description: Links with random text and sample URLs. In Markdown or <a href> HTML format. For prototyping navigation and menus.

items.title: Table
items.description: Table with random headers and data in 3–5 columns. Markdown or <table> HTML format. For pricing mockups and spec sheets.

items.title: Blockquotes
items.description: Quote blocks (blockquote) with 1–3 sentences. For testing quote styles, testimonials and highlighted text sections.

items.title: Definitions
items.description: Term + description pairs in <dl><dt><dd> HTML or text. For glossaries, FAQ sections and documentation.

contentBlocks.title: When to use Lorem Ipsum and when to use real text
contentBlocks.html:
Lorem Ipsum works well wherever content is not yet ready but the layout needs to be presented or tested:

  • UI prototypes and wireframes — designing page or app structure without waiting for final copy from the client.
  • Graphic mockups — presenting a design with realistic-looking text instead of empty rectangles.
  • Font and typography testing — evaluating readability, line height, kerning and heading hierarchy on a real text block.
  • CMS templates and themes — demonstrating the appearance of a WordPress, Shopify or other CMS template with sample content.
  • Print materials — flyers, brochures, business cards and catalogues in the design phase.

When NOT to use Lorem Ipsum:

  • Production websites — Google indexes placeholder text and may consider the page low quality. Publishing lorem ipsum harms SEO.
  • Final SEO content — meta titles, descriptions and H1 headings must contain real keywords, not filler.
  • Email marketing — sending messages with lorem ipsum is unprofessional and risks landing in spam.
  • Usability testing with users — users focus on content. Placeholder text distorts UX research results.

contentBlocks.title: Who is the Lorem Ipsum Generator for?
contentBlocks.description: The tool is useful for anyone who works with text layout:

items.title: Designers & UI designers
items.description: Quickly fill mockups and prototypes with realistic-looking text. Test typographic hierarchy and column layouts.

items.title: Frontend developers
items.description: Generate placeholder text to test components, layout responsiveness and CSS behaviour with varying content lengths.

items.title: Copywriters
items.description: Prototype text structure: how many paragraphs, sentence lengths, what lists and headings look like in the final layout.

items.title: Printers & publishers
items.description: Fill flyer, brochure and catalogue templates with dummy text for client approval before final copy arrives.

items.title: Website owners
items.description: Test the look of a new CMS template or theme with sample content. Evaluate how much text is needed per page.

items.title: Design students
items.description: Learn graphic layout, typography and composition with professional placeholder text instead of random characters.

contentBlocks.title: 8 placeholder text styles — all available in the generator
contentBlocks.html:
Our generator offers 8 unique placeholder text styles — from classical Latin to legal jargon. Each style has its own bank of 90+ words and generates text with a natural rhythm:

  • Lorem Ipsum — the classic Latin placeholder text from Cicero's work. The industry standard for over 500 years.
  • Hipster Ipsum — hipster culture vocabulary: craft, avocado, vintage, mindfulness. Ideal for lifestyle projects.
  • Business Ipsum — corporate jargon: synergy, leverage, stakeholder, KPI. For presentation and corporate website mockups.
  • English filler — random words in the local language from various fields. Shows the client what text will look like in the design.
  • Bacon Ipsum — meat and grilling vocabulary: steak, brisket, barbecue. Popular among developers.
  • Cupcake Ipsum — bakery vocabulary: muffin, chocolate, caramel, frosting. For food industry projects.
  • Pirate Ipsum — pirate-themed text: ahoy, treasure, galleon, rum. For entertainment and game projects.
  • Legal Ipsum — legal terminology: jurisdiction, plaintiff, statute, liability. For law firm website mockups.

Fun variants (Bacon, Cupcake, Pirate) work well in internal presentations and projects where humour improves team communication. For professional client presentations, use classic Lorem Ipsum or Legal Ipsum — they are neutral and don't distract from the design.

English filler is a unique option in our generator — local language words preserve the natural letter proportions and word lengths characteristic of the target language. Ideal for showing clients a realistic preview of text in their project.

contentBlocks.title: Lorem Ipsum and SEO — does placeholder text harm rankings
contentBlocks.html:
Yes — publishing Lorem Ipsum on a production website can negatively affect search rankings. Google analyses the content of every indexed page and recognises placeholder text. Here is why it matters:

  • Thin content — a page with placeholder text offers no value to users. Google classifies such pages as "thin content" and lowers their position.
  • Junk indexing — Google's bots index Lorem Ipsum as page content. It may appear in search results, affecting brand image.
  • Crawl budget waste — Google allocates a limited crawl budget for each site. Pages with lorem ipsum consume that budget without benefit.
  • Core Web Vitals — placeholder text does not directly affect performance metrics, but low-quality pages may be ranked lower overall.

How to avoid the problem: before publishing, search your entire site for the phrase "lorem ipsum" or "dolor sit amet". In Google Search Console, check that no indexed page contains placeholder text. Use the command site:yourdomain.com "lorem ipsum" in Google search.

The Lorem Ipsum Generator is a tool for the design phase. Placeholder text should be replaced with real content before publishing the website.

contentBlocks.title: Frequently asked questions about the Lorem Ipsum Generator

items.question: What is Lorem Ipsum?
items.answer: Lorem Ipsum is the standard placeholder text used in the printing, graphic design and web development industries. It is used to fill layouts with realistic-looking text when the final content is not yet ready. The text has a natural rhythm and letter distribution similar to real language, making the design look credible.
items.answerSchemaText: Lorem Ipsum is the standard placeholder text used in the printing, graphic design and web development industries.

items.question: Where does Lorem Ipsum come from?
items.answer: Lorem Ipsum originates from De Finibus Bonorum et Malorum (On the Ends of Good and Evil) written by Marcus Tullius Cicero in 45 BC. It is a philosophical treatise on ethics. The original passage from section 1.10.32 was deliberately altered by an unknown printer in the 16th century — words were added, removed and rearranged so the text had no meaning but retained the natural look of Latin.
items.answerSchemaText: Lorem Ipsum originates from De Finibus Bonorum et Malorum by Cicero, written in 45 BC.

items.question: Is Lorem Ipsum real Latin?
items.answer: Partially. Lorem Ipsum contains real Latin words from Cicero's work, but the text was deliberately corrupted. Words are mixed up, some lack endings and others were added. Therefore the text makes no sense in Latin — but individual words like dolor (pain), amet (loves) and ipsum (itself) are genuine Latin terms.
items.answerSchemaText: Partially — it contains real Latin words from Cicero but the text was deliberately corrupted and has no meaning.

items.question: How many paragraphs of Lorem Ipsum do I need for a mockup?
items.answer: It depends on the page type. For a landing page, 5–8 paragraphs usually suffice (hero, benefits, social proof, CTA). A service page needs 4–6 paragraphs. A blog article requires 8–15 paragraphs (1,500–2,500 words). A product card needs 2–3 paragraphs. The generator lets you create exactly the amount you need.
items.answerSchemaText: Depends on page type: landing page 5–8, service page 4–6, blog article 8–15, product card 2–3 paragraphs.

items.question: Can I use Lorem Ipsum on a live website?
items.answer: No. Lorem Ipsum is intended for the design phase only. Publishing placeholder text on a production website harms SEO (Google classifies it as thin content), negatively affects brand image and may be indexed in search results. Always replace placeholder text with real content before publishing.
items.answerSchemaText: No — placeholder text harms SEO and brand image. Always replace it with real content before publishing.

items.question: Does Lorem Ipsum harm SEO?
items.answer: Yes, if published on a production website. Google recognises placeholder text and may consider the page low quality (thin content). To check whether your site contains lorem ipsum, use the command site:yourdomain.com lorem ipsum in Google or search your entire site for the phrase dolor sit amet.
items.answerSchemaText: Yes, if published on a live site — Google recognises placeholder text and classifies it as thin content.

items.question: What are Hipster Ipsum and Business Ipsum?
items.answer: These are thematic variants of placeholder text. Hipster Ipsum uses hipster culture vocabulary (craft, avocado, vintage, mindfulness). Business Ipsum is corporate jargon (synergy, leverage, stakeholder, KPI). Both generate text with a natural rhythm but with industry-specific vocabulary. They work well in internal presentations where humour improves communication.
items.answerSchemaText: Thematic Lorem Ipsum variants — Hipster uses lifestyle vocabulary, Business uses corporate jargon.

items.question: How do I generate Lorem Ipsum with HTML tags?
items.answer: In the generator settings, change the output format from Text to HTML. The generator will automatically wrap paragraphs in <p> tags and lists in <ul><li>. Then click Copy HTML to copy the tagged code to clipboard. The ready code can be pasted directly into an HTML editor or CMS.
items.answerSchemaText: Change the format to HTML in settings, generate text and click Copy HTML.

items.question: Is the generator free and safe?
items.answer: Yes. The Lorem Ipsum Generator is completely free, with no registration and no limits. All text is generated locally in your browser — nothing is sent to a server. The tool does not collect personal data, does not use tracking cookies and works offline after the page loads.
items.answerSchemaText: Yes — free, no registration, local browser processing, no data collection.

items.question: How many words does a standard Lorem Ipsum paragraph have?
items.answer: In our generator, paragraph length depends on the chosen setting: short (2–4 sentences, approx. 20–50 words), medium (4–7 sentences, approx. 40–90 words), long (7–12 sentences, approx. 70–150 words). The original first paragraph of Lorem Ipsum from Cicero has about 69 words and starts with Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
items.answerSchemaText: Depends on setting: short 20–50 words, medium 40–90 words, long 70–150 words.
